title: Opportunities of Study Abroad
content:
Opportunities of Study Abroad

English Preparatory: England Program

In the 2012-2013 academic year, the first 6 students who completed the English Preparatory School successfully and got a grade of 5.5 or above on the IELTS exam were sent to London for a 6-month language program.

In the 2013-2014 academic year, the first 6 students who completed the English Preparatory School successfully and got a grade of 5.5 and over on the IELTS exam were sent to Manchester for a 4-month language program.

Arabic Preparatory: Jordan Program

Students who successfully complete 6 levels in the Arabic Preparatory School in the International Faculty of Islamic and Religious Studies are sent to Jordan for three months as guest students in order to improve their Arabic skills as well as to take various courses relevant to their subject areas.
